phases.title: Before Delivery Prep
phases.description: Steps to take before you arrive and before accepting delivery.

items.title: VIN confirmed
items.description: Verify the VIN on the car matches your order confirmation.

items.title: Monroney sticker present
items.description: The price sticker should be on the window. Confirm all options including seating configuration.

items.title: Registration and title documents
items.description: Confirm all required registration and title documents are provided.

items.title: Seating configuration correct
items.description: Verify the vehicle has the correct seating configuration you ordered (5, 6, or 7 seats).

items.title: Mobile Connector included
items.description: Confirm a Mobile Connector is present.

items.title: All row floor mats present
items.description: Verify floor mats for all rows are present and correctly fitted.

phases.title: Locked Exterior
phases.description: Inspect the exterior while the car is locked. Pay special attention to Falcon Wing door alignment.

items.title: Panel gaps even
items.description: Walk around the car and check all panel gaps are even and consistent.

items.title: Panels flush
items.description: Check that all body panels sit flush. Especially check the Falcon Wing door edges against the body.

items.title: Falcon Wing doors closed flush
items.description: With both Falcon Wing doors closed, inspect the gap between each door and the body. Gaps should be even top to bottom and at the center seam. This is the most common fit issue on Model X.

items.title: Falcon Wing center seam aligned
items.description: The two Falcon Wing doors meet at the center of the roof. Check the seam is aligned and the gap is even.

items.title: Headlight fit
items.description: Check both headlight assemblies are flush with surrounding body panels.

items.title: Taillight fit
items.description: Check both taillight assemblies for flush fit and even alignment.

items.title: No paint chips or scratches
items.description: Inspect all painted surfaces for chips, scratches, or scuffs. Pay close attention to door edges and the Falcon Wing door undersides.

items.title: No paint runs or drips
items.description: Look for paint runs, drips, or orange peel texture.

items.title: Color consistency
items.description: Verify paint color is consistent across all panels including Falcon Wing door undersides.

items.title: Panoramic windshield no chips or cracks
items.description: Model X has a large panoramic windshield that extends over the front seats. Inspect the entire surface including the overhead section.

items.title: Falcon Wing door glass intact
items.description: Inspect the glass panels in both Falcon Wing doors for chips or cracks.

items.title: Rear window intact
items.description: Check the rear liftgate window for chips or cracks.

items.title: Front door handles flush
items.description: Front doors have flush/auto-presenting handles. With the car locked, handles should be retracted and flush.

items.title: Badging correctly placed
items.description: Check Tesla T logos front and rear. Verify any model badging is straight and properly adhered.

items.title: Wheel finish undamaged
items.description: Inspect all four wheels for curb rash, scratches, or finish damage.

items.title: Tires no damage
items.description: Check all four tires for sidewall damage, uneven wear, or embedded objects.

items.title: Tire pressure correct
items.description: Check that all tires appear correctly inflated. Confirm on dashboard after unlocking.

phases.title: Unlocked Exterior
phases.description: Inspect with doors open. Thoroughly test Falcon Wing door operation.

items.title: Both Falcon Wing doors open and close fully
items.description: Open and close both Falcon Wing doors multiple times. Each should open fully without hesitation, auto-adjust for low ceilings, and close completely without grinding.

items.title: Falcon Wing door seals seated correctly
items.description: With doors closed, inspect the door seals around the entire Falcon Wing door perimeter for tears, misalignment, or unseated sections.

items.title: No grinding or unusual sounds during operation
items.description: Listen carefully during Falcon Wing door open/close cycles for grinding, scraping, or excessive motor noise.

items.title: Falcon Wing obstacle detection
items.description: Place a hand near a Falcon Wing door as it opens in a low space. Verify the door auto-adjusts without contact.

items.title: Front doors open and close smoothly
items.description: Open and close both front doors. Test the auto-presenting handle operation when approaching the car.

items.title: Front door seals seated correctly
items.description: Inspect rubber door seals for tears, misalignment, or areas that are not seated correctly.

items.title: Headlights operational
items.description: Turn on headlights and verify both low and high beam work on each side.

items.title: Taillights and brake lights operational
items.description: Verify taillights, brake lights, and reverse lights all function correctly.

items.title: Turn signals operational
items.description: Test all four turn signals and the hazard lights.

items.title: Frunk opens and closes correctly
items.description: Open and close the frunk. It should latch securely and sit flush when closed.

items.title: Frunk interior paint and liner
items.description: Inspect frunk interior for paint damage, dents, or missing liner material.

items.title: Power liftgate operates correctly
items.description: Test powered liftgate open and close. Verify it auto-stops at the set height.

items.title: Liftgate seal complete
items.description: Verify the liftgate weather seal is properly seated and unbroken around the entire opening.

phases.title: Interior and Controls
phases.description: Inspect the full cabin including all seat rows, trim, screens, and controls.

items.title: Front seats no damage
items.description: Inspect seat upholstery for cuts, stains, uneven stitching, or loose panels.

items.title: Second row seats no damage
items.description: Inspect second-row seat upholstery, fold-flat, and slide mechanism.

items.title: Third row seats no damage (if equipped)
items.description: If 7-seat, inspect third-row upholstery and fold-flat mechanism. Third-row seats should fold flush into the floor.

items.title: Seat adjustment works
items.description: Test powered seat adjustment for all front seat positions: forward/back, up/down, recline, lumbar.

items.title: Seat heating works
items.description: Enable seat heating from the display. Verify front and rear seat heating responds.

items.title: Dashboard panels fit and flush
items.description: Check dashboard panels for consistent fit, gaps, or misalignment.

items.title: Door panels properly fitted
items.description: Check front door panels for correct fit and no rattles. Inspect Falcon Wing door interior panels as well.

items.title: Headliner clean and fitted
items.description: Inspect headliner for stains, sagging, or loose edges across the full panoramic area.

items.title: Carpet clean and fitted
items.description: Check carpet for stains, tears, or misalignment in all three rows.

items.title: Main 17-inch touchscreen functional
items.description: Power on and verify the landscape touchscreen responds accurately to touch across the entire surface.

items.title: No dead pixels on main screen
items.description: Check for dead or stuck pixels across the main display at different brightness levels.

items.title: Rear entertainment screen functional
items.description: Verify the rear passenger display powers on and responds to touch.

items.title: Steering yoke/wheel controls responsive
items.description: Test all controls on the steering yoke or wheel.

items.title: Horn works
items.description: Test the horn.

items.title: HVAC heats and cools
items.description: Enable heating and cooling from the display. Verify air reaches all rows.

items.title: Bioweapon Defense Mode active
items.description: Enable Bioweapon Defense Mode and verify it activates.

items.title: Premium audio system works
items.description: Play audio through all speakers. Listen for buzzing or distortion.

items.title: Wireless charging works
items.description: Place a Qi-compatible phone on the wireless charging pad and verify it charges.

items.title: USB ports functional (all rows)
items.description: Test front and rear USB-C ports with a device. Check second row USB ports if present.

items.title: Overhead lights work (all rows)
items.description: Test map lights and dome lights including rear row lighting.

items.title: Ambient lighting works
items.description: Enable ambient lighting from the display and verify it illuminates correctly.

phases.title: Frunk, Cargo and Accessories
phases.description: Inspect cargo areas and verify all accessories are present.

items.title: Cargo floor and liner undamaged
items.description: Inspect cargo floor liner for cuts, stains, or damage.

items.title: Liftgate seal complete
items.description: Verify the liftgate weather seal is properly seated and unbroken.

items.title: Second and third row seats fold correctly
items.description: Test fold-flat of second and third-row seats (if equipped) and verify cargo space.

items.title: Two key cards present
items.description: Confirm two NFC key cards are included. Test both on the door pillar.

items.title: Phone key paired
items.description: Set up phone key in the Tesla app and verify it unlocks the vehicle.

items.title: Mobile Connector cable intact
items.description: Inspect Mobile Connector cable and adapters for damage.

phases.title: Drive and Final Verification
phases.description: Take a short test drive and complete final system checks.

items.title: Acceleration smooth
items.description: Test acceleration from stop. No shudder, hesitation, or unusual sounds.

items.title: Braking smooth
items.description: Test brakes at low speed. No pulling, grinding, or pulsation.

items.title: Regenerative braking works
items.description: Verify regen braking engages on lift-off with expected deceleration.

items.title: Air suspension levels correctly
items.description: Test air suspension height adjustments from the display. Verify the car raises and lowers smoothly.

items.title: Steering straight with no pull
items.description: Drive straight and verify the car tracks straight without pulling to one side.

items.title: No unusual vibration
items.description: Listen and feel for unusual vibrations from wheels, suspension, or drivetrain.

items.title: No unusual noises
items.description: Listen for wind noise, rattles, or squeaks. Check for Falcon Wing door rattles specifically.

items.title: Autopilot/FSD enables
items.description: Test Autopilot or FSD engagement on an appropriate road. Verify cameras are clear.

items.title: All cameras functional
items.description: Access the camera view on the display and verify all cameras display correctly.

items.title: GPS/Navigation accurate
items.description: Open navigation and verify GPS lock is acquired and location is accurate.

items.title: Software up to date
items.description: Check Software settings panel for current version and any pending updates.

items.title: Odometer reading reasonable
items.description: Verify odometer reading is low and consistent with a new delivery (under 50 miles typically).
